name: Az Premier Golf LLC
about: AZ Premier Golf LLC offers a mobile golf simulator experience, bringing the course directly to the customer's location. Their service includes state-of-the-art simulator setups, real-time ball tracking with shot tracer, and an on-site caddie for technical support. The company provides full delivery, setup, and takedown services, aiming to provide a convenient, premium golf experience for practice, play, or events.
why_golfers_like_it: Mobile service brings the golf simulator to any location
Advanced ball tracking technology with real-time shot tracer
On-site caddie provides hands-on tech support during the experience
Full-service delivery and setup removes logistical burdens

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service provided by the company.
No mention of alcohol service provided by the company.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided by AZ Premier Golf or if customers must bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if outside food and drinks are permitted during the simulator rental.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required to play a full 18 holes on their simulator.

faq.question: Is the experience kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website mentions players of all skill levels can enjoy the experience, but does not explicitly state if it is designed for or appropriate for children.
